mapper.select: insert into query_rewrite_audits ( query_id, original_question, rewritten_question, matched_rule_codes, rewrite_applied, created_at ) values ( #{queryId}, #{originalQuestion}, #{rewrittenQuestion}, #{matchedRuleCodesJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{rewriteApplied}, current_timestamp ) returning audit_id
